metadata.title: Products | Premium Agro & Spices | Kodai Global Exports
metadata.description: Explore Kodai Global Exports product range including food and industrial grade tapioca starch, tapioca flour, premium sago varieties, and fine spices like coffee beans and cloves.

openGraph.title: Premium Agro & Spices | Kodai Global Exports
openGraph.description: High-quality agro products and spices supplied with consistency and export-focused standards.

slides.title: Premium {tapioca starch} for export
slides.subtitle: Food and industrial grade tapioca starch processed for purity, neutral taste, and excellent binding properties.

slides.title: High quality {tapioca flour}
slides.subtitle: Finely milled cassava product valued for its light texture and versatility in baking and gluten-free foods.

slides.title: Premium {sago varieties}
slides.subtitle: Clean appearance, uniform size, and excellent cooking consistency for various food applications.

slides.title: Aromatic {premium cloves}
slides.subtitle: Carefully selected and graded cloves with strong aroma and flavor to meet international standards.

slides.title: Export-quality {coffee beans}
slides.subtitle: Robusta and Arabica varieties sourced for distinct flavor profiles and reliable supply.

soon.title: Custom requirements welcome
soon.description: Share your destination country, product type, packing size, and expected quantity. We will review the requirement and respond with the next steps.
